name: Candy Malt Shoppe Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups fat-free frozen vanilla yogurt, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare the crust, combine graham cracker crumbs and oil in a small mixing bowl. Press into prepared pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes.
5. To prepare the filling, combine vanilla yogurt and whipped topping in a mixing bowl until well blended.
6. Mix 1 cup crushed malted milk balls into yogurt mixture.
7. Spoon into prebaked pie crust.
8. Top with remaining malted milk balls.
9. Freeze for 4 hours or until firm.
